items.title: Anthropic tries to keep its new AI model away from cyberattackers as enterprises look to tame AI chaos
items.abstract: Sure, at some point quantum computing may break data encryption — but well before that, artificial intelligence models already seem likely to wreak havoc. That became starkly apparent this week
